text: Query and aggregate canonical actuals consistently by account, date range, category, Spend Pool, Payment Instrument, Cardholder Attribution, lifecycle, relationship, evidence, and Reconciliation State. Evidence: direct — the owner requires exact pool/category reporting and evidence-backed reconciliation; workflows UC-LEDGER-005, UC-LEDGER-010, UC-LEDGER-011, UC-LEDGER-016, and UC-LEDGER-018.
target: Equivalent filters over unchanged active state select identical snapshot membership; exact Net Account Movement, External Spend, and Budget Actual totals reconcile by pool and category and remain consumable by BUDGET and INSIGHTS without duplicated finance logic.
